brief.title: Partner lead workflow review
brief.summary: Prioritized review for a Feature that changes partner lead claims, security boundaries, and proof coverage.

snapshots.title: PWA installability finished; launch remains gated.
snapshots.doneSummary: Install metadata, icons, and telemetry were added.
snapshots.needsYouSummary: Attach external launch evidence before calling this ready.

snapshots.title: OCR guardrails got stricter.
snapshots.doneSummary: Tax, names, dates, birthplace, and admission aliases now get deterministic review.
snapshots.needsYouSummary: Use generated PDFs as QA drafts until reviewer verification passes.

snapshots.title: Named-field stamping replaced coordinate stamping.
snapshots.doneSummary: The safer named-field fill path is recorded with proof and previous context.

reviewItems.title: Approve partner claim boundaries
reviewItems.why: The copy and workflow decide what partner attribution means to the user.
reviewItems.decisionNeeded: Confirm whether the product should allow claim handoff before all proof is collected.
reviewItems.agentNext: If approved, update the acceptance criteria note and request missing proof. Do not mark done until proof passes.

reviewItems.title: Review partner lead security
reviewItems.why: The change touches RLS and service-role boundaries.
reviewItems.decisionNeeded: Confirm the server-only service-role boundary and anon denial behavior.
reviewItems.agentNext: Collect RLS proof and attach it as a new proof handle before marking this item done.

reviewItems.title: Check responsive empty state
reviewItems.why: The empty state is the first experience for new teams.
reviewItems.decisionNeeded: No decision needed unless visual hierarchy changed after the screenshot proof.
reviewItems.agentNext: Keep the item closed unless the design changes.

changeUnits.title: Partner claim UI and empty state
changeUnits.reason: Adds the first-value path and improves the no-data state.

changeUnits.title: Partner lead RLS boundary
changeUnits.reason: Moves sensitive partner claim checks behind server-only access.

notes.text: The workflow treats claim handoff as a product decision because it affects trust and support expectations.
Confirm whether anon reads should remain fully denied for unclaimed partner leads.

proof.summary: Primary claim flow was checked manually.
proof.proves: The happy path reaches the confirmation state.
proof.doesNotProve: Does not prove security boundaries or edge cases.

proof.summary: Responsive empty state screenshot passed visual review.
proof.proves: The empty state remains readable at desktop and mobile widths.
proof.doesNotProve: Does not prove every authenticated state.
